channel.title: Phonetica
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Phonetica

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Lư Giang Đinh, Marc Brunelle, Thành Tấn Tạ DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phon-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: The vowel space of multiethnolectal (Stuttgart) German
item.description: Article by Lư Giang Đinh, Marc Brunelle, Thành Tấn Tạ DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phon-2023-0017

item.title: Redundant voicing and register in Mnong Râlâm
item.description: Article by Lư Giang Đinh, Marc Brunelle, Thành Tấn Tạ DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phon-2024-0023

item.title: Relating production and perception in two Raglai dialects at different stages of registrogenesis
item.description: Article by Lư Giang Đinh, Marc Brunelle, Thành Tấn Tạ DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phon-2024-0032
